title: IT Reuse for Good charter
body: "The Department of Science, Innovation and Technology (DSIT), Good Things Foundation, VodafoneThree and Deloitte LLP have developed an IT Reuse for Good charter for businesses and public sector bodies.  Express your interest in the charter to pledge a ‘reuse first’ approach with your IT assets. Signing the charter will help:   change lives promote circularity support Net Zero   An accompanying playbook provides practical information and support no matter where you are on your device reuse journey. "
